{{Quote|Begone before I give the rancor under my control an unearned treat!|Fath H'ray|<ref name="SWG:FH" />}}
'''Fath H'ray''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Sometime following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], she operated at the [[Nightsister Stronghold]]. There, she served the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] as a [[Mistress of the Rancor]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Fath H'ray was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:FH" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Fath H'ray was one of the quest givers of the original "[[W:c:swg:Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park|Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park]]."<ref name="SWG:FH" /> This quest series was removed from the game upon the release of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Witches of Dathomir Theme Park|Witches of Dathomir Theme Park]]," introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Game Update 19|Game Update 19]] on [[December 14]], [[2010]].<ref name="GU19">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1160720|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: Game Update 19}}</ref> Fath H'ray's original quests were totally removed as the character was included in the new questline.<ref name="SWG:TWT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|The Whole Truth|Dathomir}}</ref>
